tasks.title: Select and install MCP TypeScript SDK
tasks.description: Use the official MCP TypeScript SDK, preferring the stable v1 package line for the first runtime integration.

tasks.title: Load server definitions from mcp.json
tasks.description: Reuse the Step 1 config helper to read MCP server definitions from /data/canvas-agent/mcp.json.

tasks.title: Implement one Pi-compatible mcp proxy tool
tasks.description: Register one AgentTool named mcp with MCP group metadata and structured model/UI results.

tasks.title: Support proxy actions
tasks.description: Implement list_servers, list_tools, search_tools, describe_tool, call_tool, and status actions.

tasks.title: Support initial non-OAuth transports
tasks.description: Support stdio MCP servers first and reserve HTTP fields while limiting HTTP to unauthenticated endpoints in this step.

tasks.title: Implement env reference expansion
tasks.description: Resolve ${NAME} references from centralized integration env, agent env, and process.env fallback without hardcoding secrets.

tasks.title: Integrate with existing tool filtering
tasks.description: Ensure getPiTools remains the authority for exposing or hiding the mcp proxy tool for each provider.

tasks.title: Handle aborts, timeouts, and safe errors
tasks.description: Honor Pi abort signals, bound long-running calls, and return safe model-readable errors without leaking secrets or stack traces.

tasks.title: Add fake MCP server tests
tasks.description: Use a local fake server to test config loading, startup, tool listing, schema description, tool calls, and error surfacing.

tasks.title: Verify Step 2 implementation
tasks.description: Run npm build and avoid container builds unless explicitly requested.
